text_block_list.text:
Nice Nature and I are taking a break during
training, when...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Isn't that Urara running over there?

In the distance, Haru Urara is running with some
other Umamusume... but she's lagging behind.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Phew... Gooooal!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Good job, Urara.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Oh, hey, Natie!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Hats off to you, seriously. I can't imagine running
with all those fast runners.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Really? But running is so fun!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
And running with them really inspires me to be
better!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Watch me in the next scrimmage! I'll get first
place for sure!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Is that so? You're a feisty one, aren'tcha?
Anyway, we're calling it a day, so see you 'round!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Don't burn yourself out with all that energy! I'm
off!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Okay! Bye-bye! ♪

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Sigh... I'm so lame...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Sorry for leaving like that. I know we aren't done
with today's training yet...
choice_data_list: Can I ask you why you did that?
Can I ask you why you did that?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: It's really stupid—embarrassing, really.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: ...Fiiine.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I always thought only winners could shine like
some hero.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
But then I saw Urara. She was... glowing just as
bright. Heck, maybe even brighter.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Now... I feel kind of strange. Like all my escape
routes are blocked off.
choice_data_list: I can secure you an escape route.
I can secure you an escape route.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Now... I feel kind of strange. Like all my escape
routes are blocked off.
choice_data_list: I can secure you an escape route.
I can secure you an escape route.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: What do you mean?

I tell her that the spotlight can shine on anyone.
She can be a star no matter what position she
finishes in.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: As always, you're such a positive thinker, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
A side character like me could never say anything
like that.
choice_data_list: To me, you're always the main charact—
To me, you're always the main charact—

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Eep!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: I-I get it, I get it! Wowie, how our views differ!
choice_data_list: Are you okay? Your face is getting red.
Are you okay? Your face is getting red.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
...Ever heard of the word "subtlety"? You should
be keeping observations like that to yourself!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: ...Geez. What am I going to do with you?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Hey, finished with your training?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Huh?

If it gets too hard, you can always rely on me. We
can recoup together...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Urp...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Wh-what's with you?! Trying to make yourself look like the reliable grown-up or something?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Geez... well, I guess it did sound kinda cool, if only for a split second.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Heh. If that's the case, I'll start taking advantage
of it immediately.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I'd like some takoyaki from the shopping district
to heal my wounded spirit, please!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
That's my trainer! You sure know how to please
me! ♪

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
That's my trainer! You sure know how to please
me! ♪

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Hey, finished with your training?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Yup! It was sooo fun!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Heh, I see. I'm glad you had fun.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
You seem like you had some fun too, Natie! You
look all smiley and happy! ♪

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: What? D-do I?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Well, I guess I am, thanks to a certain someone.
